name: Ghost Blocks: Publish from a topic

parameters.title: ={{ $json.topic }}
parameters.content:
=[
  { "type": "paragraph", "text": {{ JSON.stringify($json.summary) }} },
  { "type": "heading", "level": 2, "text": "Why this matters" },
  { "type": "paragraph", "text": "Simple, focused interfaces ship faster and are easier to reason about. They reduce cognitive load and make automation trivial." },
  { "type": "divider" },
  { "type": "callout", "text": "This post was published by an n8n workflow.", "emoji": "\ud83e\udd16", "color": "blue" }
]
